items.notes:
Updates surface on their own: periodic auto-check + menu-bar update row

- Updater.startPeriodicChecks(): check on launch, then quietly every 6h while
  running, so a new version appears without relaunching. Skips a tick while an
  update is downloading/installing; dormant until configured; idempotent.
- AppModel.bootstrap now starts the periodic checks instead of a one-shot check.
- MenuBarView: a live "Update to X / Install & Relaunch" row in the dropdown,
  observing the updater directly — no need to open Settings or relaunch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
